text: Did you see the CMS thing this morning? They're proposing reimbursement cuts to midwifery services again. Neil sent me the article before I even had coffee.
I saw it. Hazel and Owen are lucky they don't know what their mom's work is actually worth to the system apparently 😒
Asheville's already short on OBs and they want to make it harder to keep practices like ours open. Loretta called it 'government nonsense.' She's not wrong.
Are we doing anything about it or just stress-posting in the CNM group chat again?
Probably both. Clinic day's tomorrow — I'll bring it to the staff meeting. Someone needs to draft a comment before the public period closes.
I'll find the deadline tonight. Also saw that flooding on 26. You taking that route in the morning?
Taking 240. Last thing I need is to be late because of a washed-out road. Bag's already packed.
Good call. See you at 8.
Dani posted about doula certification requirements and the comments are already a mess. She tagged me to weigh in — do I or do I just watch it burn 😅
Hazel did you see Dani's post about the birth center fundraiser? You should share it — more Asheville people need to know we exist 😤
Owen did you see Dani's post about the birth center fundraiser? Share it. We need Asheville people to actually show up this time.
Dani shared that post about birth centers in Asheville and I left a comment. Probably too long but I had things to say 😅
Dad did you see Loretta shared that video of the Asheville drum circle? I'm going to need her to stop posting things that make me want to quit midwifery and become a full-time hippie 😂
Did you see Priya's post about the new birth center opening in Asheville? Commented already but feels weird just hitting like on something that big. 🙃
saw your post about the Asheville farmers market and now I'm sending Neil with both kids Saturday morning so I can actually walk through it alone. you manifested this for me
Did you see what Dani posted about the Asheville birth center numbers? I left a comment — couldn't not. Felt like Willow Creek needed a voice in that thread.
hey Dr., quick one about reply to a friend's post
Did you see Dani's post about the Asheville birth center fundraiser? Wrote a comment and immediately regretted the typo. Leaving it.
Did you see the CMS thing this morning? They're proposing reimbursement cuts to midwifery services again. Neil sent me the article before I even had coffee.
I saw it. Hazel and Owen are lucky they don't know what their mom's work is actually worth to the system apparently 😒
